My Journey: From Chaos to Connection
In 2023, when my life felt like a storm of personal and professional hurdles,
Radha Krishna entered my heart. What began as a desperate search for
peace turned into a deep, meditative connection with the Divine.
Through dedicated chakra healing and a spiritual awakening, I began to
receive guidance in my dreams and the sacred silence of meditation. It was
here that I connected with Archangel Michael, who provided the protection
and clarity I needed to uncover my soul’s true purpose.
After knowing my purpose, I dedicated myself to mastering the sacred arts.
Today, as a Certified Tarot Reader and a Certified Reiki Healer, I am here to
help you navigate your own path with clarity, light, and divine grace.
My Mission: Healing Millions
I am here to be a bridge for those who feel lost, alone, or broken. Guided by
my Krishna and the celestial strength of the Archangels, I use the tools of
Reiki, Tarot, and Meditation to help you rediscover your inner light.
